phase_locking.note: ecHT_R measures phase-locking to the stimulation trigger. Model PLV measures phase-locking to the external drive. Empirical values are higher because ecHT measures trigger-locked coherence (closed-loop), while model uses open-loop continuous forcing.

sleep_depth.note: Empirical uses sleep stage (0=wake, 1=N1, 2=N2, 3=N3). Model uses SDR (delta+theta)/(alpha+beta). Both are proxies for sleep depth.

aperiodic_slope.note: Model does not directly compute aperiodic exponent. SDR serves as a proxy: higher SDR implies steeper spectral slope.

alpha_frequency.note: Empirical IAF from off-periods. Model uses 10 Hz as alpha drive.
